description_long: This is a large, modern city bus with a predominantly white exterior and black-tinted windows running along both sides. The bus features the bold red 'Disney' logo and a yellow 'Transport' sign on its side, indicating it is part of a themed transportation fleet. The front of the bus is streamlined with a wide windshield and a low, flat nose, while the rear has ventilation grilles and the Disney branding. The bus has two sets of passenger doors on the right side, with the front door being wider and equipped with a step for entry. The wheels are black with metallic hubcaps, and the roof is flat and unadorned. The overall design is utilitarian yet visually striking, suitable for urban or resort environments.
description: A large white city bus with black-tinted windows, Disney Transport branding, and two passenger doors on the right side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, flat nose, and subtle detailing around the headlights.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the full Disney Transport branding, black-tinted windows, and both passenger doors.
description_view_2: Rear view with ventilation grilles and the Disney logo, as well as the bus's squared-off back.
description_view_3: Left side view with black-tinted windows and no visible doors, highlighting the clean, uninterrupted side panel.
attribute_window_arrangement: Seven large, rectangular, evenly spaced black-tinted passenger windows along each side, separated by vertical pillars, with no significant variation in size or grouping.
